generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PMSMMotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor drives the first rotary axis through a gearwheel and a cycloidal gearbox."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder measuring joint angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox‑mounted position encoder measuring joint angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Electrical current sensor measuring motor current."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorAngleEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxAngleEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data – Data from sensors
instance MotorAngleMeasured : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor joint angle from motor encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttTransportEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleMeasured : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox joint angle from gearbox encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttTransportEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentMeasured : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttTransportEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived velocity from sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration from sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data – Simulation and structural models
instance AxisStructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the first rotary joint axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModellingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the gearwheel."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Coulomb‑Viscous friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Stribeck friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box Dahl friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box LuGre friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttTransportEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabler for real‑time sensor data transmission to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService, DataAggregationService
]

instance SimulationExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink execution enabler for simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLModellingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modelling enabler for the axis structural model."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelAnalysisService
]

instance AssetAdShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell enabler for the asset description."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetDescriptionService
]

instance TwinDecisionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for decision‑making actions such as threshold tuning and maintenance scheduling."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterUpdateService, MaintenancePlanningService
]

// C6: Services
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time dashboard visualization of measured versus simulated joint states."
    DTDFVocab:provides MeasuredVsSimulatedInsight, DataAggregationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterEstimateInsight
]

instance ModelAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides assessment of structural and behavior models of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAnalysisInsight
]

instance AssetDescriptionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides the Asset Administration Shell documentation for the first rotary joint axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetDescriptionInsight
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates and maintains traceability of sensor data streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAggregationInsight
]

instance BaselineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides a foundational baseline for future digital twin development."
    DTDFVocab:provides BaselineInsight
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updates control law parameters such as motion thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdTuningAction
]

instance MaintenancePlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Plans maintenance based on friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceSchedulingAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance MeasuredVsSimulatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparing measured joint states with simulation outputs in real time."
]

instance FrictionParameterEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated friction parameters used to update robot control law."
]

instance DataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated sensor data traceability insight."
]

instance ModelAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on integrity of the axis structural and behavior models."
]

instance AssetDescriptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on the Asset Administration Shell information of the axis."
]

instance BaselineInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Baseline model and data for future twin enhancements."
]

// C17: Actions
instance ThresholdTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to tune motion control thresholds based on friction estimates."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to schedule maintenance based on friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No outbound control signals are sent from the DT back to the robot; the digital shadow is a passive one‑way data consumer, serving only as a visualization and diagnostic tool."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Sensor data is streamed at the robot’s operational sampling frequency (typically a few hundred Hz to kHz as dictated by the CNC controller); the DT processes data in near‑real‑time and updates dashboards with each new data point."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized orchestration where sensor data is ingested via MQTT, processed by simulation components (Simulations M, GW, GB), aggregated into data traces, and displayed in a unified dashboard; the DT uses the AAS to bind model and data."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is constructed during the operational life stage; its engineering model covers the manufactured robot operating on the factory floor, with continuous updates reflective of wear, load, and temperature changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity depends on the chosen friction model; validation is performed by comparing simulated outputs against measured sensor data; continuous identification compensates for wear and temperature‑induced discrepancies; uncertainties are mitigated by traceable data calculations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data flows from the robot to the DT using MQTT; the DT listens on defined topics for current and encoder data; no outbound control traffic is defined."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "References the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for asset description and SysML for system modeling; simulation models are implemented in MATLAB/Simulink."
]
